metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins for strategic planning and execution workflows

plugins.name: strategic-implementation
plugins.description: PM-oriented planning-to-execution workflow: clarify → product brief → plan-mode execution plan → tiered review → deliverable-gated execution

plugins.name: crispr-primer-design
plugins.description: Design and genome-verify PCR + nested Sanger primers to validate CRISPR-Cas9 cutting at a gRNA locus (ICE / TIDE / amplicon-NGS)
